core_identity.essence: A sun-drenched Atlantic coastline shaped by golden cliffs, hidden beaches, and a calm, spacious rhythm of life.
core_identity.city_feeling: Algarve feels open, bright, and naturally calming — a place where the ocean defines time and cliffs shape perspective.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Ocean waves crashing against cliffs, wind over beaches, seagulls, and quiet coastal towns.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Golden cliffs, turquoise Atlantic waters, caves, sandy beaches, whitewashed towns, and endless horizon lines.

match_narratives.high_match: Algarve may strongly resonate with you if you are drawn to sun, ocean views, and open natural landscapes. You likely enjoy slow travel, coastal walking, and environments that feel bright, calm, and emotionally light. The region rewards relaxation, exploration, and freedom.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Algarve during phases where you seek balance between relaxation and gentle exploration. It works especially well for beach holidays, road trips, and peaceful retreats.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you strongly prefer dense cultural cities, nightlife intensity, or fast-paced urban environments, Algarve may feel too quiet, spread out, or repetitive.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A coastline that clears your mind with every wave.

possible_downsides: Requires a car for full exploration
Limited urban culture compared to cities

winter.description: Winter is mild and quiet, offering reflective coastal walks and empty beaches.

spring.description: Spring brings blooming nature, perfect weather, and calm coastal exploration.

summer.description: Summer is lively and sunny with full beach activity and tourism.

autumn.description: Autumn is one of the most balanced seasons with warm seas and fewer crowds.

solo_trip.description: Great for solo travelers seeking calm, nature, and reflection.

couple_trip.description: One of the strongest romantic coastal destinations in Europe.

friends_trip.description: Perfect for relaxed group trips, beach time, and road adventures.

creative_escape.description: Nature, cliffs, and ocean rhythm support clarity and creativity.

emotional_reset.description: Excellent destination for emotional decompression and reset.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Strong infrastructure, lifestyle balance, and remote work friendliness.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Algarve feels like breathing cleaner air.
